javascript:(function()%7Bfunction%20wildcardToRegex(pattern)%20%7B%20if%20(!pattern)%20return%20%2F%5E.*%24%2F%3B%20let%20escaped%20%3D%20pattern.replace(%2F%5B%5C%5C%5E%24%2B.%7C()%5B%5C%5D%7B%7D%5D%2Fg%2C%20'%5C%5C%24%26')%3B%20escaped%20%3D%20escaped.replace(%2F%5C*%2Fg%2C%20'.*').replace(%2F%5C%3F%2Fg%2C%20'.')%3B%20return%20new%20RegExp(escaped%2C%20'i')%3B%20%7D%20function%20matchText(text%2C%20pattern)%20%7B%20if%20(!pattern)%20return%20true%3B%20const%20terms%20%3D%20pattern.split('%26').map(p%20%3D%3E%20p.trim()).filter(Boolean)%3B%20if%20(terms.length%20%3D%3D%3D%200)%20return%20true%3B%20return%20terms.some(term%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20regex%20%3D%20wildcardToRegex(term)%3B%20return%20regex.test(text)%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20function%20launchOverlay()%20%7B%20if%20(typeof%20window.__fwDestroy%20%3D%3D%3D%20'function')%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20window.__fwDestroy()%3B%20%7D%20catch(e)%20%7B%7D%20%7D%20const%20existing%20%3D%20document.getElementById('fidelity-wildcard-overlay')%3B%20if%20(existing)%20existing.remove()%3B%20const%20style%20%3D%20document.createElement('style')%3B%20style.id%20%3D%20'fw-overlay-styles'%3B%20style.innerHTML%20%3D%20%60%20%23fidelity-wildcard-overlay%20%7B%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%20top%3A%2020px%3B%20right%3A%2020px%3B%20z-index%3A%202147483647%3B%20background%3A%20rgba(255%2C%20255%2C%20255%2C%200.05)%3B%20backdrop-filter%3A%20blur(20px)%3B%20-webkit-backdrop-filter%3A%20blur(20px)%3B%20border%3A%201px%20solid%20rgba(128%2C%20128%2C%20128%2C%200.15)%3B%20border-radius%3A%204px%3B%20padding%3A%202px%208px%3B%20box-shadow%3A%200%204px%2016px%20rgba(0%2C%200%2C%200%2C%200.08)%3B%20font-family%3A%20-apple-system%2C%20BlinkMacSystemFont%2C%20%22SF%20Pro%20Text%22%2C%20%22Helvetica%20Neue%22%2C%20Helvetica%2C%20Arial%2C%20sans-serif%3B%20color%3A%20inherit%3B%20display%3A%20flex%3B%20align-items%3A%20center%3B%20gap%3A%206px%3B%20min-width%3A%20220px%3B%20height%3A%2028px%3B%20box-sizing%3A%20border-box%3B%20animation%3A%20fw-fade-in%200.2s%20ease-out%3B%20%7D%20%23fidelity-wildcard-overlay.inline%20%7B%20position%3A%20relative%20!important%3B%20top%3A%20-50px%20!important%3B%20left%3A%20auto%20!important%3B%20right%3A%20auto%20!important%3B%20bottom%3A%20auto%20!important%3B%20margin%3A%200%208px%20!important%3B%20box-shadow%3A%20none%20!important%3B%20border%3A%201px%20solid%20rgba(0%2C%200%2C%200%2C%200.85)%20!important%3B%20border-radius%3A%204px%20!important%3B%20background%3A%20rgba(255%2C%20255%2C%20255%2C%200.03)%20!important%3B%20%7D%20%40keyframes%20fw-fade-in%20%7B%20from%20%7B%20opacity%3A%200%3B%20transform%3A%20translateY(-4px)%3B%20%7D%20to%20%7B%20opacity%3A%201%3B%20transform%3A%20translateY(0)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20%23fw-search-input%20%7B%20background%3A%20transparent%3B%20border%3A%20none%3B%20color%3A%20inherit%3B%20padding%3A%200%3B%20font-size%3A%2012px%3B%20font-weight%3A%20400%3B%20outline%3A%20none%3B%20flex%3A%201%3B%20width%3A%20100%25%3B%20height%3A%20100%25%3B%20letter-spacing%3A%20-0.01em%3B%20%7D%20%23fw-search-input%3A%3Aplaceholder%20%7B%20color%3A%20rgba(128%2C%20128%2C%20128%2C%200.55)%3B%20%7D%20%23fw-match-count%20%7B%20color%3A%20rgba(128%2C%20128%2C%20128%2C%200.7)%3B%20font-size%3A%2010px%3B%20font-weight%3A%20500%3B%20font-variant-numeric%3A%20tabular-nums%3B%20border-left%3A%201px%20solid%20rgba(128%2C%20128%2C%20128%2C%200.2)%3B%20padding-left%3A%206px%3B%20margin-left%3A%202px%3B%20white-space%3A%20nowrap%3B%20user-select%3A%20none%3B%20%7D%20.fw-btn%20%7B%20background%3A%20transparent%3B%20border%3A%20none%3B%20color%3A%20rgba(128%2C%20128%2C%20128%2C%200.7)%3B%20cursor%3A%20pointer%3B%20font-size%3A%2011px%3B%20padding%3A%202px%3B%20display%3A%20flex%3B%20align-items%3A%20center%3B%20justify-content%3A%20center%3B%20border-radius%3A%203px%3B%20transition%3A%20color%200.15s%2C%20background%200.15s%3B%20%7D%20.fw-btn%3Ahover%20%7B%20background%3A%20rgba(128%2C%20128%2C%20128%2C%200.1)%3B%20color%3A%20inherit%3B%20%7D%20.fw-hidden-row%20%7B%20display%3A%20none% %7Ctooltip%7Cearnings%7Canalytics%7Cdrawer%7Coverlay%7Cmodal%7Caside%7Csidebar%7Cdetail%7Cexpand%2Fi%3B%20function%20getTextContentDeep(node%2C%20isRoot%20%3D%20false)%20%7B%20if%20(!node)%20return%20''%3B%20if%20(node.tagName%20%3D%3D%3D%20'STYLE'%20%7C%7C%20node.tagName%20%3D%3D%3D%20'SCRIPT')%20return%20''%3B%20if%20(node.nodeType%20%3D%3D%3D%20Node.ELEMENT_NODE)%20%7B%20const%20role%20%3D%20node.getAttribute%20%3F%20node.getAttribute('role')%20%3A%20null%3B%20if%20(role%20%26%26%20SKIP_ROLES.has(role))%20return%20''%3B%20const%20cls%20%3D%20typeof%20node.className%20%3D%3D%3D%20'string'%20%3F%20node.className%20%3A%20''%3B%20if%20(node.tagName%20%3D%3D%3D%20'SVG'%20%7C%7C%20node.tagName%20%3D%3D%3D%20'svg')%20return%20''%3B%20const%20isGridContainer%20%3D%20cls.includes('ag-row')%20%7C%7C%20cls.includes('ag-cell')%20%7C%7C%20cls.includes('pos-row')%3B%20if%20(!isRoot%20%26%26%20!isGridContainer%20%26%26%20cls%20%26%26%20SKIP_CLASS_RE.test(cls))%20%7B%20return%20''%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20if%20(node.nodeType%20%3D%3D%3D%20Node.TEXT_NODE)%20%7B%20return%20node.nodeValue%3B%20%7D%20let%20text%20%3D%20''%3B%20let%20child%20%3D%20node.firstChild%3B%20while%20(child)%20%7B%20text%20%2B%3D%20getTextContentDeep(child%2C%20false)%3B%20child%20%3D%20child.nextSibling%3B%20%7D%20if%20(node.shadowRoot)%20%7B%20text%20%2B%3D%20getTextContentDeep(node.shadowRoot%2C%20false)%3B%20%7D%20return%20text%3B%20%7D%20let%20originalTops%20%3D%20new%20Map()%3B%20function%20applyFilter()%20%7B%20const%20pattern%20%3D%20input.value.trim()%3B%20if%20(clearBtn)%20%7B%20clearBtn.style.display%20%3D%20input.value%20%3F%20'flex'%20%3A%20'none'%3B%20%7D%20const%20rows%20%3D%20querySelectorAllDeep(currentSelector)%3B%20const%20groups%20%3D%20%7B%7D%3B%20rows.forEach(row%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(row.tagName%20%3D%3D%3D%20'TR'%20%26%26%20row.querySelector('th'))%20return%3B%20if%20(row.className%20%26%26%20row.className.includes('ag-header-row'))%20return%3B%20const%20rowIndex%20%3D%20row.getAttribute('row-index')%20%7C%7C%20row.getAttribute('row-id')%20%7C%7C%20row.id%20%7C%7C%20'single'%3B%20if%20(!groups%5BrowIndex%5D)%20%7B%20groups%5BrowIndex%5D%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20%7D%20groups%5BrowIndex%5D.push(row)%3B%20%7D)%3B%20const%20groupKeys%20%3D%20Object.keys(groups)%3B%20const%20totalCount%20%3D%20groupKeys.length%3B%20if%20(!pattern)%20%7B%20rows.forEach(row%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20row.classList.remove('fw-hidden-row')%3B%20if%20(originalTops.has(row))%20%7B%20const%20orig%20%3D%20originalTops.get(row)%3B%20row.style.top%20%3D%20orig.top%3B%20row.style.transform%20%3D%20orig.transform%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20originalTops.clear()%3B%20badge.textContent%20%3D%20%60%24%7BtotalCount%7D%20%2F%20%24%7BtotalCount%7D%60%3B%20return%3B%20%7D%20let%20matchedCount%20%3D%200%3B%20let%20accumulatedY%20%3D%200%3B%20const%20groupKeys%20%3D%20Object.keys(groups).sort((a%2C%20b)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20na%20%3D%20parseInt(a%2C%2010)%3B%20const%20nb%20%3D%20parseInt(b%2C%2010)%3B%20if%20(!isNaN(na)%20%26%26%20!isNaN(nb))%20return%20na%20-%20nb%3B%20return%20a.localeCompare(b)%3B%20%7D)%3B%20groupKeys.forEach(rowIndex%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20groupRows%20%3D%20groups%5BrowIndex%5D%3B%20totalCount%2B%2B%3B%20let%20combinedText%20%3D%20''%3B%20groupRows.forEach(row%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20combinedText%20%2B%3D%20'%20'%20%2B%20getTextContentDeep(row%2C%20true)%3B%20%7D)%3B%20combinedText%20%3D%20combinedText.replace(%2F%5Cs%2B%2Fg%2C%20'%20').trim()%3B%20const%20isMatch%20%3D%20!pattern%20%7C%7C%20matchText(combinedText%2C%20pattern)%3B%20let%20groupHeight%20%3D%2038%3B%20const%20firstRow%20%3D%20groupRows%5B0%5D%3B%20if%20(firstRow)%20%7B%20const%20heightStyle%20%3D%20firstRow.style.height%20%7C%7C%20window.getComputedStyle(firstRow).height%3B%20const%20parsedHeight%20%3D%20parseFloat(heightStyle)%3B%20if%20(!isNaN(parsedHeight)%20%26%26%20parsedHeight%20%3E%200)%20%7B%20groupHeight%20%3D%20parsedHeight%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20if%20(isMatch)%20%7B%20matchedCount%2B%2B%3B%20groupRows.forEach(row%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20row.classList.remove('fw-hidden-row')%3B%20if%20(!originalTops.has(row))%20%7B%20originalTops.set(row%2C%20%7B%20top%3A%20row.style.top%2C%20transform%3A%20row.style.transform%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20const%20styleAttr%20%3D%20row.getAttribute('style')%20%7C%7C%20''%3B%20if%20(styleAttr.includes('transform%3A')%20%7C%7C%20styleAttr.includes('translateY')%20%7C%7C%20row.style.transform)%20%7B%20if%20(row.style.transform%20%26%26%20row.style.transform.includes('translateY'))%20%7B%20row.style.transform%20%3D%20row.style.transform.replace(%2FtranslateY%5C(%5B-%5Cd.%5D%2Bpx%5C)%2F%2C%20%60translateY(%24%7BaccumulatedY%7Dpx)%60)%3B%20%7D%20else%20if%20(styleAttr.includes('translateY'))%20%7B%20const%20newStyle%20%3D%20styleAttr.replace(%2FtranslateY%5C(%5B-%5Cd.%5D%2Bpx%5C)%2F%2C%20%60translateY(%24%7BaccumulatedY%7Dpx)%60)%3B%20row.setAttribute('style'%2C%20newStyle)%3B%20%7D%20else%20%7B%20row.style.transform%20%3D%20%60translateY(%24%7BaccumulatedY%7Dpx)%60%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20else%20%7B%20row.style.top%20%3D%20accumulatedY%20%2B%20'px'%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20accumulatedY%20%2B%3D%20groupHeight%3B%20%7D%20else%20%7B%20groupRows.forEach(row%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20row.classList.add('fw-hidden-row')%3B%20if%20(originalTops.has(row))%20%7B%20const%20orig%20%3D%20originalTops.get(row)%3B%20row.style.top%20%3D%20orig.top%3B%20row.style.transform%20%3D%20orig.transform%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20badge.textContent%20%3D%20%60%24%7BmatchedCount%7D%20%2F%20%24%7BtotalCount%7D%60%3B%20%7D%20input.addEventListener('input'%2C%20applyFilter)%3B%20if%20(clearBtn)%20%7B%20clearBtn.addEventListener('click'%2C%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20input.value%20%3D%20''%3B%20applyFilter()%3B%20input.focus()%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20applyFilter()%3B%20const%20observer%20%3D%20new%20MutationObserver((mutations)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20isOverlayMutation%20%3D%20mutations.every(m%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20overlay%20%3D%20document.getElementById('fidelity-wildcard-overlay')%3B%20return%20overlay%20%26%26%20overlay.contains(m.target)%3B%20%7D)%3B%20if%20(isOverlayMutation)%20return%3B%20applyFilter()%3B%20positionOverlay()%3B%20%7D)%3B%20observer.observe(document.body%2C%20%7B%20childList%3A%20true%2C%20subtree%3A%20true%20%7D)%3B%20function%20cleanupTargeting()%20%7B%20if%20(!isTargeting)%20return%3B%20isTargeting%20%3D%20false%3B%20if%20(targetBtn)%20%7B%20targetBtn.style.color%20%3D%20'%2394a3b8'%3B%20targetBtn.style.background%20%3D%20'transparent'%3B%20%7D%20if%20(hoverTarget)%20%7B%20hoverTarget.classList.remove('fw-highlight-target')%3B%20hoverTarget%20%3D%20null%3B%20%7D%20document.removeEventListener('mousemove'%2C%20handleMouseMove%2C%20true)%3B%20document.removeEventListener('click'%2C%20handleGlobalClick%2C%20true)%3B%20%7D%20function%20handleMouseMove(e)%20%7B%20if%20(!isTargeting)%20return%3B%20const%20path%20%3D%20e.composedPath()%3B%20const%20rowMatches%20%3D%20path.filter(el%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(!el.tagName)%20return%20false%3B%20const%20tag%20%3D%20el.tagName.toLowerCase()%3B%20const%20classes%20%3D%20Array.from(el.classList%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D).join('%20').toLowerCase()%3B%20if%20(el.id%20%3D%3D%3D%20'fidelity-wildcard-overlay'%20%7C%7C%20el.id%20%3D%3D%3D%20'fw-search-input')%20return%20false%3B%20return%20tag%20%3D%3D%3D%20'tr'%20%7C%7C%20tag%20%3D%3D%3D%20'li'%20%7C%7C%20el.getAttribute%3F.('role')%20%3D%3D%3D%20'row'%20%7C%7C%20el.getAttribute%3F.('role')%20%3D%3D%3D%20'listitem'%20%7C%7C%20tag.includes('row')%20%7C%7C%20tag.includes('holding')%20%7C%7C%20classes.includes('row')%20%7C%7C%20classes.includes('holding')%20%7C%7C%20classes.includes('position')%3B%20%7D)%3B%20const%20target%20%3D%20rowMatches.length%20%3E%200%20%3F%20rowMatches%5BrowMatches.length%20-%201%5D%20%3A%20null%3B%20if%20(target%20%26%26%20target.tagName%20%26%26%20!document.getElementById('fidelity-wildcard-overlay').contains(target))%20%7B%20if%20(hoverTarget%20%26%26%20hoverTarget%20!%3D%3D%20target)%20%7B%20hoverTarget.classList.remove('fw-highlight-target')%3B%20%7D%20hoverTarget%20%3D%20target%3B%20hoverTarget.classList.add('fw-highlight-target')%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20function%20handleGlobalClick(e)%20%7B%20if%20(!isTargeting)%20return%3B%20e.preventDefault()%3B%20e.stopPropagation()%3B%20const%20clickedRow%20%3D%20hoverTarget%20%7C%7C%20e.composedPath()%5B0%5D%3B%20if%20(clickedRow%20%26%26%20clickedRow.tagName)%20%7B%20const%20tag%20%3D%20clickedRow.tagName.toLowerCase()%3B%20const%20classes%20%3D%20Array.from(clickedRow.classList%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D)%20.filter(c%20%3D%3E%20c%20!%3D%3D%20'fw-highlight-target'%20%26%26%20c%20!%3D%3D%20'fw-hidden-row')%20.join('.')%3B%20currentSelector%20%3D%20classes%20%3F%20%60%24%7Btag%7D.%24%7Bclasses%7D%60%20%3A%20tag%3B%20%7D%20cleanupTargeting()%3B%20applyFilter()%3B%20%7D%20function%20enableTargeting()%20%7B%20if%20(isTargeting)%20return%3B%20isTargeting%20%3D%20true%3B%20if%20(targetBtn)%20%7B%20targetBtn.style.color%20%3D%20'%236366f1'%3B%20targetBtn.style.background%20%3D%20'rgba(99%2C%20102%2C%20241%2C%200.2)'%3B%20%7D%20document.addEventListener('mousemove'%2C%20handleMouseMove%2C%20true)%3B%20document.addEventListener('click'%2C%20handleGlobalClick%2C%20true)%3B%20%7D%20if%20(targetBtn)%20%7B%20targetBtn.addEventListener('click'%2C%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(!isTargeting)%20%7B%20enableTargeting()%3B%20%7D%20else%20%7B%20cleanupTargeting()%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20function%20destroy()%20%7B%20observer.disconnect()%3B%20cleanupTargeting()%3B%20window.removeEventListener('resize'%2C%20positionOverlay)%3B%20window.removeEventListener('scroll'%2C%20positionOverlay)%3B%20const%20rows%20%3D%20querySelectorAllDeep(currentSelector)%3B%20rows.forEach(row%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20row.classList.remove('fw-hidden-row')%3B%20if%20(originalTops.has(row))%20%7B%20const%20orig%20%3D%20originalTops.get(row)%3B%20row.style.top%20%3D%20orig.top%3B%20row.style.transform%20%3D%20orig.transform%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20originalTops.clear()%3B%20container.remove()%3B%20style.remove()%3B%20%7D%20closeBtn.addEventListener('click'%2C%20destroy)%3B%20window.destroyFidelityOverlay%20%3D%20destroy%3B%20window.__fwDestroy%20%3D%20destroy%3B%20%7D%20if%20(!document.getElementById('fidelity-wildcard-overlay'))%20%7B%20launchOverlay()%3B%20%7D%7D)()%3B
